title: attendance — TenancyHook + lifecycle hooks
description: Eight cascade hooks: atomic pass consumption + refund coordinators, absence detection + threshold evaluator, membership freeze cascade, tenant-erasure cascade, and two archive-prevention hooks (enrollment + session).

hooks.name: ConsumePassAtomicallyOnAttendanceCreated
hooks.purpose: P1 hook. When session.requires_pass=true, opens a DB transaction, SELECT ... FOR UPDATE the earliest unconsumed Pass in the enrollment's active membership's current period, UPDATE passes SET consumed_at + consumed_by_session_id + refunded_at=NULL, SETS attendance.consumed_pass_id + attendance.membership_id, COMMITS. On any failure, rolls back both writes + fires PassConsumeAtomicityFailed. THIS IS THE LOAD-BEARING ATOMICITY GUARANTEE — CleanupOrphanCheckinsJob cross-checks + surfaces any drift as P1.
hooks.note: Priority 10 — runs BEFORE every other listener on AttendanceRecord.creating. If this hook fails, no downstream listeners fire — the attendance record does not commit.

hooks.name: RefundPassAtomicallyOnAttendanceCancelled
hooks.purpose: P1 hook. Reverse of ConsumePassAtomicallyOnAttendanceCreated. When an attendance is cancelled, opens a DB transaction, SELECT ... FOR UPDATE the Pass, UPDATE passes SET consumed_at=NULL + consumed_by_session_id=NULL + refunded_at=now() + refund_reason='attendance_cancelled', SETS attendance.consumed_pass_id remains for audit but the Pass returns to the unused pool. Rolls back on failure + fires PassRefundAtomicityFailed.

hooks.name: DetectAndCreateAbsencesForCompletedSession
hooks.purpose: Optional in-band absence detection. When a Session transitions to completed status BEFORE the nightly ReconcileAttendanceJob runs, immediately sweep expected attendees for that session and create AbsenceRecord for no-shows. Lets the coach's post-session summary notification carry fresh absence data.
hooks.note: Non-critical — if this hook fails, the nightly reconciler picks up the same absences the next morning.

hooks.name: EvaluateAbsenceThresholdOnAbsenceRecorded
hooks.purpose: In-band rolling-window check. Given the newly-recorded absence, computes the athlete's unexcused-absence count in the applicable policy's freeze_period_days window. If count crosses max_unexcused_absences_per_period, fires AbsenceFreezeThresholdReached (P1). Also runs on excusal reversals to re-evaluate.

hooks.name: FreezeMembershipOnThresholdReached
hooks.purpose: P1 hook. Pauses the athlete's active membership via `membership::MembershipObserver.setStatus('paused', pause_reason='attendance_threshold', paused_by='attendance_module')`. The pause suspends renewal + future pass generation until admin manually resumes via membership:resume. Refuses to fire when tenant lacks `attendance_freeze_enforcement` entitlement (event still fires for audit trail, membership stays active).

hooks.name: PurgeAttendanceDataForErasedTenant
hooks.purpose: Cascade delete via FK. Records under regulator hold survive as compliance archive rows (managed by compliance module). Writes compliance audit + emits count metrics per aggregate.

hooks.name: PreventEnrollmentArchiveWithActiveAttendance
hooks.listens_to: athlete-enrollment::EnrollmentWithdrawn / EnrollmentExpelled (pre-write when cascade would hard-delete)
hooks.purpose: Refuse hard-delete of an AthleteEnrollment when active AttendanceRecord references remain. Terminal enrollments soft-delete OK; hard-delete waits for retention window.
hooks.returns: ATHLETE_ENROLLMENT_HAS_ATTENDANCE (409) with the attendance record count in the error payload

hooks.name: PreventSessionArchiveWithActiveAttendance
hooks.purpose: Refuse Session archive when active AttendanceRecord references remain. Historical rows survive; the session cannot be archived out from under them. cascade=true on the session archive route bypasses + cancels all attendance in one transaction (which refunds every consumed Pass).

no_bootstrapper.reason: Attendance does not need a tenant-boot hydration path. Every row loads on demand.
